name: property managers processing 5–15 utility bills/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 utility bills/month, inaccurate cost allocation causes cash flow gaps. We aggregate utility bills instead of manual tracking and allocation of utility costs.
problem_solved: Inaccurate cost allocation of utility bills across properties

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inaccurate cost allocation of utility bills across properties
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers processing 5–15 utility bills/month, inaccurate cost allocation causes cash flow gaps. We aggregate utility bills instead of manual tracking and allocation of utility costs.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking and allocation of utility costs

one_liner: For property managers processing 5–15 utility bills/month, inaccurate cost allocation causes cash flow gaps. We aggregate utility bills instead of manual tracking and allocation of utility costs.
